0.text: Effusions extending into the fissures of both lungs

1.text: Increased interstitial marking in the lung parenchyma

2.text: Interstitial septal thickening within the lung parenchyma

3.text: Interstitial lobular thickening within the lung parenchyma

4.text: Scattered focal ground-glass opacities throughout both lungs

5.text: Mosaic attenuation pattern in the parenchyma of both lungs
